name: Tortilla Rollups#1
recipeIngredient: Black Olives - cut into small pieces
1 can Chile's or Jalapenos - cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Add the taco mix, black olives, and jalapenos to the bowl.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Place a flour tortilla on a plate or cutting board.
5. Spread the mixture onto the tortilla, covering it completely.
6. Roll up the tortilla tightly.
7. Chill the rollups for at least 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
